description: Composition Multi-hued check shorts, has two side pockets, two patch pockets at the back, stitch detailing, comfortable waistband with belt loops and buttoned and zipped closure front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations For a practical look which won't distract him from play, choose these shorts - perfect for active boys. For a comfortable outfit, team this with a T-shirt and sandals.
